name: Access By Skip
principals: 'Skip' (veteran owner; full name not disclosed publicly)
service_types: mobility equipment installer (hand controls, wheelchair lock-downs, scooter/vehicle lifts, minivan floor-drops, motorhome adaptation)
districts_or_customers: Veterans Administration (mobility equipment work); retail customers in Edgewater FL / Volusia County. No transport district contracts — does not operate a transportation service.
recent_news: Rebranded to ABS Mobility (absmobility.com); continues as a vehicle mobility-modification shop, not a transport operator.
fit_notes: NOT AN OPERATOR — disqualify. Access By Skip / ABS Mobility installs hand controls, wheelchair lock-downs, and vehicle lifts for disabled drivers; it does not provide passenger transport, school bus service, or NEMT trips. Mis-tagged in the source dataset. Remove from Summit tuck-in pipeline.
